name: academorix/expenses
purpose: Tenant expense management — Expense, ExpenseCategory, CostCenter, Budget, PayrollRun, PayrollLine aggregates for operational spend tracking.
capabilities: Budget aggregate (bdg_ prefix) — cap + spent tracking
when_to_use: A tenant tracks operational expenses, budgets, and staff payroll inside Academorix rather than an external accounting system.
when_not_to_use: For customer-facing invoicing and revenue, use academorix/invoice + academorix/transaction.
